title: Free Space Management in Secondary Storage
description: This flowchart illustrates the process an operating system uses to manage free space on a disk, including the allocation of blocks to a new file and the updating of free space records.
elements: Free Space List (e.g., Bitmap, Linked List)
relationships: A 'New File Request' triggers a search of the 'Free Space List'
The 'Free Space List' provides the location of free blocks to 'Allocate Contiguous Blocks'
'Allocate Contiguous Blocks' assigns blocks from 'Secondary Storage'
'Update Free Space List' modifies the record to mark blocks as used
'File System Metadata' is updated with the new file's block locations
